name: Low Calorie Lemon Bavarian from Kaitlin Young
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the apple juice and gelatin. Let stand in a container of hot water until dissolved.
2. Stir in the lemon juice, lemon rind, and pineapple juice, and chill until partially set.
3. Meanwhile, pour the evaporated skim milk into a bowl and place it in the freezer until crystals form. Once the gelatin mixture is set, beat the evaporated milk until thick and fluffy. Beat the gelatin mixture until light and frothy. Combine the two mixtures together, and pour into a mold. Chill until set.
